name: Qwen3.5
metaDescription: Qwen3.5 (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2026-02-16 — part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Open-weight flagship Qwen3.5-397B-A17B (397B total / 17B active) using a h…
overview: Qwen3.5 is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Released 2026-02-16. The flagship open-weight (Apache 2.0) family spanning edge-sized dense models to large MoE models, covering general text, reasoning and agentic use.

What's notable in this version: Open-weight flagship Qwen3.5-397B-A17B (397B total / 17B active) using a hybrid linear-attention + sparse-MoE architecture, native vision-language; smaller variants (122B-A10B, 35B-A3B, 27B) followed on 2026-02-24.
